summary: The diff implements all 11 requirements with high fidelity. All major sections, animations, copy, and interactive features are present. A few minor discrepancies exist: the music toggle button background uses a blurred dark maroon instead of the specified blush pink, the MusicToggle uses a Music icon from lucide-react rather than a musical note symbol when paused, and the FloatingHearts z-index is set to 1 instead of the required 0. Overall, the implementation is comprehensive and covers all requirements.

missing_requirements.requirement: Music toggle button must have blush pink background styling
missing_requirements.reason: The MusicToggle component uses a dark semi-transparent background (oklch(0.82 0.07 10 / 0.15)) rather than the specified blush pink background

missing_requirements.requirement: Floating heart particle layer must use z-index:0
missing_requirements.reason: FloatingHearts component sets zIndex to 1 rather than the specified 0

hallucinated_features.description: InternetIdentityProvider and related authentication hooks are included in the rendered app
hallucinated_features.reason: The non-goals explicitly state no user authentication or Internet Identity integration, yet main.tsx wraps the app in InternetIdentityProvider and useActor/useInternetIdentity hooks are included as files

hallucinated_features.description: A branded footer with caffeine.ai attribution link is added to the page
hallucinated_features.reason: No footer or external attribution link was requested in the build spec
